noReportsSelected: No reports selected. Use the Reports button above to choose which reports to show.

revenue_gross_profit.title: Revenue & Gross Profit
revenue_gross_profit.description_revenue: Revenue: The total value of all orders registered in the period.
revenue_gross_profit.description_profit: Profit: Total revenue minus total product cost and minus total shipping cost.
revenue_gross_profit.description_note: Product cost is registered, per unit, on the Products page. Shipping cost is registered, per unit, for each individual customer.

revenue_operating_profit.title: Revenue & Operating Profit
revenue_operating_profit.description_revenue: Revenue: The total value of all orders registered in the period.
revenue_operating_profit.description_profit: Profit: Total revenue minus total product cost and minus total shipping cost, minus any costs registered as recurring or non-recurring business costs on the New Cost page.
revenue_operating_profit.description_note: Product cost is registered, per unit, on the Products page. Shipping cost is registered, per unit, for each individual customer.
